titleStmt.title: SII 27.99: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 99. (A.R. No. 571 of 1929-30.) KAḌEKĀRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the compound of the maṭha.
This record is dated Śaka 1348, Viśvāvasu, Śrāvaṇa śu. 12, Thursday corresponding to 1425 A.D., July 26, Thursday, f.d.t. ·29. The Śaka year was current.

It records gifts of land and 400 honnu by Aṇṇa Niḍuṁbūra and the residents of Kaḍekāru to the maṭha built by them, for the worship and offerings of god Gopīnatha, installed by Vidyātma-tīrtha-śrīpada who appointed his disciple Viśvapati-tīrtha-śrīpāda as the head of that maṭha. It states that on the date Narasiṁhadēva-oḍeya was governing Bārākūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ pāṁtuvō jaladasvāmā . ga
ghāḍa karkkaśātrayilōkyavāṁ staṁbhā catvārō hari bāhavaḥ
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1348 neya viśvāva
su saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śu 12 gu śrīmanmahārājādhirā rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyara nirūpadiṁda narasiṁhadēva Oḍeyaru bāra
kūra rājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladali śrīmatsakala guṇasaṁpaṁna braṁha kṣa
triyarumappa Aṁṇa niḍuṁbūrarū yeraḍumaneya kaḍekārarkkaḷanū kūḍikoṁḍu
śrīmat vaiṣṇava siddhāṁta pratiṣṭhācāryaru mappa vidyātmatīrtha śrīpādaṁgaḷu Ā
rādhisuvaṁthā śrīgōpīnātha dēvarige kaḍekāroḷage maṭhavanu kaṭṭuvadakke mūla
bāḷa catussīmeya vivara . mūḍaṇa hedāriyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu niḍuṁ
ṁbūrara haravariya Ojiṁdayikkida kēriṁdaṁ mūḍalu . teṁkalu . dukkaḷabeṭṭiṁdaṁ
baḍagalu . baḍagalu . niḍaṁbūrara hosagaḍiya Ojiṁdaṁ teṁkalu . yiṁtī cattu
ssīme Oḷaguḷa nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Āgāma siddhisādhyamuṁtāgi sarvamānyavāgi
keṟiyadada Ardha brahmaṁ cittarige Uḷiya dhārāpūrvaka mūlavakoṁḍu maṭhavakaṭṭi
si śrīpādaṁgaḷu tāu Ārādhisuvaṁthā śrīgōpīnātha dēvara maṭhadalli pratiṣṭheya
māḍi Ā maṭhavanū dēvapūjeyanū śrīpādaṁgaḷu taṁma śiṣyaru viśvapati tīrtha
śrīpādaṁgaḷige Aṁṇa niḍuṁburaru muṁdiṭṭu vibhāgavamāḍi yēkādhipatyava
nu koṭṭu naṁdādīvige naivēdyakke māḍida bāḷa vivara . saṁnaṁgāroḷa kēśava kaḍekāra
na kaiyyali saṁnaṁgāra bayaloḷage mūlavakoṁḍa gadde mūṟu Alliyakeṟi be
ṭu keṟiya baḍagaṇa hosagadde Adaṟiṁdaṁ paḍuvaṇa gadde teṁgina tōṭaṁ yi
ṣṭaṟiṁda maṭhadayippāne Akkiya naivēdya yeraḍu naṁdādīvige . Aṁṇa niḍu
ṁburara śrīgōpīnātha dēvarige yeraḍu naṁdādīvige Oppāne Akkiya naivēdyakke dhāra
ya neṟadukoṭa bāḷu maṭhada paḍuvaṇa gadde Adaṟa teṁkaṇa bayala gadde Alliṁda
mūḍaṇa mekkeya bāḷiṁda Oppāne Akkiya naivēdya yeraḍu naṁdādīpti naḍaudu
śrīgōpīnātha dēvara [danaAḍa] Aruvārada mēle koṭṭa hoṁnu ga 400 hoṁnu yi
maṭhavanū dharmavanū pālistavarige Aśvamēdhayāgava māḍida phala sāyujya mōkṣa
yi maṭhavanū dharmavanū dhanavanū Etigaḷanū Otti Oydu keḍisidavaru śrīgō
pīnātha dēvara mūrtivasaḷidavaru Etigaḷavadhisidavaru . yi śāsanake niḍuṁburara
Oppa kaḍekārarkkaḷa Oppa nālkūru biḷineḷalavara Oppa . śrīgōpīnātha dēvaru . svadatta
ṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ varuṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
